title: Index-Librorum-Prohibitorum
description: A block that can store enchantments
body:
A block that can store enchantments for one hundred and thirty thousand enchantment books (there isn't a limit to this), no level cap, access to exploits, etc. for automation
(UI Color scheme can be changed, default HOME button opens color scheme settings)

![r](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/se9Qt5yQ/images/cc8cac12a208209e4e488344f66b37757d15f9f4.png)
![block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/se9Qt5yQ/images/2e528ecf5779014e49fc4335042e527f3cfa617a.png)
![gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/se9Qt5yQ/images/f1b8932b199d67dd5b4b8972d34573e06d30a250.png)
